data.title: Innisfree Hotels opens The Landing, a waterfront event venue in Pensacola Beach, offering modern flexibility for private celebrations.
data.description: Innisfree Hotels has introduced a newly redesigned coastal area that combines contemporary versatility with sophisticated beachfront charm, catering to personal gatherings, public functions, and all-season enjoyment. Located in Pensacola Beach, Florida, the grand opening of The Landing is set for this month, marking a significant milestone in offering a luxurious and functional space for various events.

data.title: GomSpace signs 7.6 MEUR contract with VirtuaLabs for satellite cluster for RF monitoring.
data.description: In Stockholm on March 4, 2026, GomSpace announced a new contract worth 7.6 million Euros (equivalent to 81.5 million Swedish Krona) with VirtuaLabs, an Italian firm focusing on Satellite Payloads. This agreement entails providing a constellation of satellites to aid in space-based Radio Frequency environment monitoring.

data.title: Earnings report for multiple companies on March 4th, including: National Vision Holdings ($0.03/share, $496.90M), Wix.com ($0.98/share, $527.83M), Bath & Body Works ($1.76/share, $2.61B), Dycom Industries ($1.73/share, $1.33B), Abercrombie & Fitch ($3.57/share, $1.67B), etc. After the bell: Verastem (loss $0.49/share, $17.11M), Okta ($0.62/share, $749.34M), Broadcom ($1.88/share, $19.19B).
data.description: Multiple companies are set to report their earnings before the bell, including National Vision Holdings, Wix.com, Bath & Body Works, and Abercrombie & Fitch, projected to report earnings per share ranging from $0.03 to $3.57 on revenues from $496.90 million to $2.61 billion. Companies like Dycom Industries and Genius Sports are also reporting, with expectations for earnings per share at $1.73 and $0.09, respectively, on revenues of $1.33 billion and $235.17 million. In contrast, EyePoint and Real Brokerage are expected to report losses. Verastem, Okta, and Broadcom are among the companies expected to report after the bell, with projected earnings per share of $0.49, $0.62, and $1.88, on revenues of $17.11 million, $749.34 million, and $19.19 billion, respectively. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Appcast's Chief Economist to discuss how policy shifts are impacting talent market at UNLEASH America 2026.
data.description: Andrew Flowers, Chief Economist of Appcast, is set to present groundbreaking findings from Recruitonomics research at UNLEASH America 2026 in Lebanon, N.H. On March 4, 2026. The study explores the impacts of immigration shifts, tariffs, and federal policy changes on the labor market, revealing trends of wage pressure, reduced hiring rates, and increased recruiting expenses. Don't miss the opportunity to gain insights into the current economic landscape, with crucial data on how these factors are influencing recruitment dynamics.

data.title: 50/50 Women on Boards launches 4th annual campaign to identify 50 women for board roles to achieve gender parity.
data.description: An effort has been established to expedite gender equality on corporate boards by promoting qualified female candidates. On March 4, 2026, the prominent nonprofit organization, 50/50 Women on Boards™ (50/50WOB), shared its commitment to enhancing corporate governance. Without specifying the source, the initiative aims to increase the representation of women on boards.

data.title: European Wax Center, Inc. saw a decline in centers and revenue in 2025, reporting a net loss of $1.5 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $73.3 million, a 3.0% decrease from prior year. The company will be taken private by General Atlantic in an all-cash transaction. No conference call or financial guidance for 2026 is provided.
data.description: European Wax Center, Inc. reports financial results for Fiscal Year 2025, with 1,047 centers in 44 states - a 1.9% decrease from the previous year, and system-wide sales of $947.3 million, a 0.4% decrease. Total revenue decreased by 4.7% to $206.6 million, with Same-store sales increasing by 0.2%. GAAP net income was $11.9 million, a 19.2% decrease, while Adjusted Net Income of $36.2 million decreased by 11.6%. Adjusted EBITDA decreased by 3.0% to $73.3 million. The company repurchased 1.4 million shares for $5.7 million, totaling $45.9 million under its authorization. Cash and cash equivalents were $76.1 million, with $386.0 million in borrowings. The Company will be taken private by General Atlantic in an all-cash transaction, with European Wax Center becoming a privately held company and no public listing. Further details on the financial performance can be found in their Annual Report on Form 10-K and a completion of the all-cash transaction. Please refer to the full story on Benzinga.com for additional details.

data.title: WHOOP to add 600+ jobs as it expands globally; seeking talent in Software, Research & Design, Hardware, Product, and Marketing.
data.description: WHOOP, a leading human performance company based in Boston, revealed its intention to grow its workforce by over 600 positions in departments such as Software, Research & Design, Hardware, Product, and Marketing. This expansion emphasizes the company's strategic focus on building a team that will shape the advancement of human performance and health technology worldwide. Will Ahmed, the Founder and CEO of WHOOP, highlighted the current dilemma faced by companies in deciding between increasing human capital or investing in artificial intelligence technologies.

data.title: Semrush launches Spotlight 2026 conference in London on Oct. 13, to help marketers compete in AI search era.
data.description: Semrush Holdings, Inc. revealed the launch of Spotlight 2026, a major marketing conference happening in London on October 13. The conference aims to provide marketers with essential strategies to enhance brand visibility in the era of AI search. As the relationship between SEO and AI Search grows apparent, leaders striving to maintain visibility need to adopt updated and comprehensive strategies. The event is positioned to equip attendees with the tools necessary to thrive in this evolving landscape.

data.title: National nonprofit Petco Love has distributed 4 million free pet vaccines, with a Florida couple expressing relief for their vaccinated cats.
data.description: A total of 4 million free pet vaccines have been distributed by the national nonprofit Petco Love, with the milestone recipient being a cat named Ojaris. The vaccination was received by Ojaris, owned by Florida couple Robin and Clint, who expressed relief and gratitude for the service. This event took place in San Antonio on March 4, 2026.
TESLA REINSTATED WITH BUY AT BOFA; WAS RATED NEUTRAL

data.title: FATF cautions on stablecoins as favored tool for evading sanctions. Warns of P2P transfers and urges countries to heighten AML measures.
data.description: According to the latest report, the international regulatory authority has highlighted concerns regarding peer-to-peer stablecoin transactions conducted through self-custody wallets. The report emphasizes that such transactions have the potential to evade Anti-Money Laundering (AML) checks. The watchdog has strongly advised countries to carefully evaluate the associated risks and implement appropriate protective measures. This cautionary message is crucial as it addresses the issue of potential loopholes in the current regulatory framework. It is imperative for authorities to acknowledge the significance of these warnings and take necessary actions to uphold financial security.

data.title: Euna Solutions achieves AEP® & PCI DSS compliant, improving trust & security in public sector procurement.
data.description: Euna Solutions, a prominent provider of cloud solutions for the public sector, shared today that their Euna Procurement platform has reached significant milestones. The platform has obtained both AEP® eProcurement Certification and PCI DSS Compliance. These accomplishments demonstrate Euna's dedication to ensuring top-tier efficiency, transparency, vendor accessibility, and payment security for public sector agencies in North America. These achievements speak to Euna's commitment to serving public sector agencies effectively.

data.title: NETSCOUT reports rise in complexity of DDoS attacks, 8 million worldwide in 2025, with largest at 30 Tbps.
data.description: NETSCOUT® SYSTEMS, INC. has shared its findings from the second half of 2025 regarding Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks. The report indicates a concerning trend of increased attacker collaboration, robust botnets, and compromised IoT systems leading to over eight million DDoS attacks globally. Some of these attacks reached record sizes of 30 terabits per second (Tbps), highlighting a shift towards hyper-scale and coordinated threat operations. This new era of threat activity is outpacing efforts to combat it on a global scale.

data.title: RadNet, Inc. to host conference call on March 5, 2026, for investors to discuss acquisition of Gleamer SAS and Digital Health strategy.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, RadNet, Inc. (NASDAQ: RDNT), a prominent provider of cost-effective diagnostic imaging services via a network of outpatient centers, announced an upcoming conference call on March 5th. This call will discuss the recent acquisition of Gleamer SAS and RadNet’s Digital Health strategy. Investors are encouraged to participate in the call to learn more about these developments and pose questions to executive management.
